query: SELECT id, name, url, category FROM appLinks WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM appLinks ORDER BY category, name LIMIT 50 OFFSET 40); SELECT name FROM appLinks WHERE LOWER(name) REGEXP 'photomath|kahoot|class.?dojo|starfall|clever|kimi|google classroom|ohio';
